understood_request: Build a comprehensive inventory health dashboard showing, for each product: current stock on hand per location (preserving product-location grain), reorder point, safety stock, active PO quantities on order, vendor names and credit ratings, and recent stock movement quantities (receipts, shipments, adjustments) — all combined into one mart at the product-location-vendor grain.

mart.ddl: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS mart_inventory_health_dashboard (product_bk VARCHAR, product_name VARCHAR, sku VARCHAR, product_line VARCHAR, product_class VARCHAR, unit_cost BIGINT, reorder_point BIGINT, safety_stock BIGINT, location_bk VARCHAR, location_name VARCHAR, qty_on_hand BIGINT, reorder_shortfall BIGINT, active_qty_on_order BIGINT, total_receipts BIGINT, total_shipments BIGINT, total_adjustments BIGINT, net_stock_movements BIGINT, vendor_bk VARCHAR, vendor_name VARCHAR, credit_rating BIGINT, is_preferred BOOLEAN, mart_insert_dts TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mart.populate_sql: DELETE FROM mart_inventory_health_dashboard; INSERT INTO mart_inventory_health_dashboard SELECT measures_cte.product_bk, measures_cte.product_name, measures_cte.sku, measures_cte.product_line, measures_cte.product_class, measures_cte.unit_cost, measures_cte.reorder_point, measures_cte.safety_stock, measures_cte.location_bk, measures_cte.location_name, measures_cte.qty_on_hand, measures_cte.reorder_shortfall, measures_cte.active_qty_on_order, measures_cte.total_receipts, measures_cte.total_shipments, measures_cte.total_adjustments, measures_cte.net_stock_movements, COALESCE(hv.vendor_bk, '') AS vendor_bk, COALESCE(svd.vendor_name, '') AS vendor_name, COALESCE(svd.credit_rating, 0) AS credit_rating, COALESCE(svd.is_preferred, FALSE) AS is_preferred, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS mart_insert_dts FROM (WITH product_sat AS (SELECT hp.product_hk, hp.product_bk, spd.product_name, spd.sku, spd.product_line, spd.product_class, spd.unit_cost, spd.reorder_point, spd.safety_stock FROM hub_product hp INNER JOIN sat_product_details spd ON hp.product_hk = spd.product_hk WHERE spd.load_end_dts IS NULL), location_sat AS (SELECT hl.location_hk, hl.location_bk, sld.location_name FROM hub_location hl INNER JOIN sat_location_details sld ON hl.location_hk = sld.location_hk WHERE sld.load_end_dts IS NULL), inventory_sat AS (SELECT lpl.product_location_hk, lpl.product_hk, lpl.location_hk, COALESCE(sil.qty_on_hand, 0) AS qty_on_hand FROM lnk_product_location lpl LEFT JOIN sat_inventory_levels sil ON lpl.product_location_hk = sil.product_location_hk WHERE sil.load_end_dts IS NULL OR sil.load_end_dts IS NULL), movement_sat AS (SELECT product_location_hk, SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'receipt' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_receipts, SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'shipment' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_shipments, SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'adjustment' THEN quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_adjustments, SUM(CASE WHEN movement_type = 'receipt' THEN quantity WHEN movement_type = 'shipment' THEN -quantity ELSE quantity END) AS net_stock_movements FROM sat_stock_movement_details WHERE load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY product_location_hk), po_quantities AS (SELECT lppo.product_hk, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(spod.status_code AS VARCHAR) NOT IN ('completed', 'cancelled') THEN COALESCE(spol.qty_ordered - COALESCE(spol.qty_received, 0), 0) ELSE 0 END) AS active_qty_on_order FROM lnk_product_purchase_order lppo INNER JOIN sat_po_line_details spol ON lppo.product_purchase_order_hk = spol.product_purchase_order_hk INNER JOIN sat_purchase_order_details spod ON lppo.purchase_order_hk = spod.purchase_order_hk WHERE spol.load_end_dts IS NULL AND spod.load_end_dts IS NULL GROUP BY lppo.product_hk) SELECT ps.product_bk, ps.product_name, ps.sku, ps.product_line, ps.product_class, ps.unit_cost, ps.reorder_point, ps.safety_stock, ls.location_bk, ls.location_name, inv.qty_on_hand, GREATEST(ps.reorder_point - inv.qty_on_hand, 0) AS reorder_shortfall, COALESCE(poq.active_qty_on_order, 0) AS active_qty_on_order, COALESCE(mov.total_receipts, 0) AS total_receipts, COALESCE(mov.total_shipments, 0) AS total_shipments, COALESCE(mov.total_adjustments, 0) AS total_adjustments, COALESCE(mov.net_stock_movements, 0) AS net_stock_movements, ps.product_hk FROM product_sat ps INNER JOIN inventory_sat inv ON ps.product_hk = inv.product_hk INNER JOIN location_sat ls ON inv.location_hk = ls.location_hk LEFT JOIN movement_sat mov ON inv.product_location_hk = mov.product_location_hk LEFT JOIN po_quantities poq ON ps.product_hk = poq.product_hk) measures_cte LEFT JOIN lnk_product_vendor lpv ON measures_cte.product_hk = lpv.product_hk LEFT JOIN hub_vendor hv ON lpv.vendor_hk = hv.vendor_hk LEFT JOIN sat_vendor_details svd ON hv.vendor_hk = svd.vendor_hk WHERE svd.load_end_dts IS NULL OR svd.load_end_dts IS NULL;

aggregations: SUM(CASE WHEN spod.status_code NOT IN ('completed','cancelled') THEN COALESCE(spol.qty_ordered - COALESCE(spol.qty_received,0), 0) ELSE 0 END) AS active_qty_on_order
SUM(CASE WHEN ssm.movement_type = 'receipt' THEN ssm.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_receipts
SUM(CASE WHEN ssm.movement_type = 'shipment' THEN ssm.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_shipments
SUM(CASE WHEN ssm.movement_type = 'adjustment' THEN ssm.quantity ELSE 0 END) AS total_adjustments
SUM(CASE WHEN ssm.movement_type = 'receipt' THEN ssm.quantity WHEN ssm.movement_type = 'shipment' THEN -ssm.quantity ELSE ssm.quantity END) AS net_stock_movements
